case_title: WHITBECK, ROBERT vs. SCHEELE, RANDALL et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITBECK, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT SCHEELE, RANDALL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SCHEELE, RANDALL
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT SCHEELE, RANDALL

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITBECK, ROBERT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-25-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-02-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. PRESENT W/MICHAEL ROSSOFF AS COUNSEL. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 291 BRODERICK, 	, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 5-15-94 - DEF. TO PAY $764 RENT & DAMAGES BY 5-1-94 - NO FURTHER STAYS DEF. CERTIF. NO OTHER ADULTS W/RIGHT OF POSSESSION - $900 SEC. DEP. TO BE RETAINED BY PL. - PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - UPON TERMS BEING MET BY DEF, PL. TO FILE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT OR IF DEF. PREPARE NECESSARY PAPERS, PL. WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DISM THIS ACTION. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHEELE, RANDALL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 291 BRODERICK ST, 	, S.F, CA. $764.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $764.00, STAYED UNTIL MAY-15-1994, WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 5-15-94.NO STAYS ON EVICTION. DEF. WARRANTS NO OTHERS WITH RIGHT OF POSSESSION.PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. SEC. DEP. RETAINED BY PL.IN LIEU OF ATTY FEES & COSTS. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
